metadata.notes: v2.0.0 — fully normalized to match Pydantic schema: Country, Authority, SourceEndpoint, ParserRegistry. Nulls left for runtime-populated fields (last_crawled_at, snapshot hashes, health metrics).

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India
authorities.notes: Primary central authority for all labour law, enforcement, and social security policy

authorities.name: Income Tax Department – Ministry of Finance
authorities.notes: Central direct tax authority; CBDT issues policy circulars

authorities.name: Bureau of Immigration – Ministry of Home Affairs
authorities.notes: Foreigners registration, employment and business visas, OCI cards

authorities.name: Ministry of Law and Justice – Legislative Department
authorities.notes: Authoritative source for all central Acts, Bills, Ordinances, and Constitution

authorities.name: Directorate General Factory Advice Service & Labour Institutes (DGFASLI)
authorities.notes: OSH regulator for factories, docks; enforces OSH Code 2020 for organised sector

authorities.name: Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)
authorities.notes: Manages PF, EPS pension, EDLI insurance for organised sector

authorities.name: Fair Work Ombudsman
authorities.notes: Primary enforcer of employment conditions, minimum wages, and NES compliance

authorities.name: Fair Work Commission
authorities.notes: Tribunal for enterprise agreements, award variations, unfair dismissal

authorities.name: Australian Taxation Office (ATO)
authorities.notes: Income tax, PAYG, superannuation, GST, FBT

authorities.name: Department of Home Affairs
authorities.notes: Work visas, skilled migration, employer sponsorship obligations

authorities.name: Federal Register of Legislation
authorities.notes: Authoritative source for all Commonwealth Acts and instruments

authorities.name: Safe Work Australia
authorities.notes: National OSH policy body; enforcement is by state/territory regulators

authorities.name: Ministry of Manpower (MOM)
authorities.notes: Employment Act, work passes, workplace safety (OSHD), foreign worker levy

authorities.name: Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (IRAS)
authorities.notes: Income tax, GST (9%), property tax, withholding tax, stamp duty

authorities.name: CPF Board – Central Provident Fund
authorities.notes: Mandatory savings for SG citizens and PRs; covers retirement, Medisave, HDB

authorities.name: Immigration & Checkpoints Authority (ICA)
authorities.notes: PR and citizenship applications; long-term passes

authorities.name: Singapore Statutes Online – Attorney-General's Chambers
authorities.notes: Authoritative repository of all Singapore Acts and subsidiary legislation

authorities.name: Workplace Safety and Health Council (WSHC)
authorities.notes: Industry-specific WSH guidelines, bizSAFE framework; policy arm under MOM-OSHD

authorities.name: Department of Employment and Labour
authorities.notes: LRA, BCEA, employment equity, UIF, COIDA, skills development, OSH inspection

authorities.name: South African Revenue Service (SARS)
authorities.notes: Income tax, PAYE, VAT (15%), corporate tax, customs

authorities.name: Department of Home Affairs
authorities.notes: Work visas (critical skills, general, intra-company), PR, business visas; high URL instability

authorities.name: South African Government – Official Gazette
authorities.notes: Proclamations, notices, regulations, all new legislation

authorities.name: Commission for Conciliation, Mediation and Arbitration (CCMA)
authorities.notes: Dispute resolution for unfair dismissal and unfair labour practices; free to employees

authorities.name: Unemployment Insurance Fund (UIF)
authorities.notes: 2% UIF contributions; claims for unemployment, illness, maternity

authorities.name: Ministry of Human Resources & Emiratisation (MOHRE)
authorities.notes: Federal Labour Law No. 33/2021; WPS; Emiratisation; dispute resolution; OSH for mainland

authorities.name: Federal Tax Authority (FTA)
authorities.notes: Corporate Tax (9% since June 2023), VAT (5%), Excise Tax

authorities.name: Federal Authority for Identity, Citizenship, Customs & Port Security (ICP)
authorities.notes: Residence visas, Emirates ID, Golden and Green Visa

authorities.name: UAE Federal Legislation – Ministry of Justice
authorities.notes: Official repository of UAE federal laws and decrees

authorities.name: General Pension & Social Security Authority (GPSSA)
authorities.notes: Social security for UAE nationals only; 12.5% employer + 5% employee

authorities.name: Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC)
authorities.notes: Separate jurisdiction from federal UAE law; own Employment Law (DIFC Law No. 2/2019) and OSH regime

authorities.name: Employment New Zealand – MBIE
authorities.notes: Employment Relations Act 2000; minimum wage; leave; collective bargaining; personal grievances

authorities.name: WorkSafe New Zealand
authorities.notes: Primary regulator under HSWA 2015; incident notification, enforcement, codes of practice

authorities.name: Inland Revenue – Te Tari Taake
authorities.notes: PAYE, GST (15%), KiwiSaver, Working for Families, student loan

authorities.name: Immigration New Zealand (INZ) – MBIE
authorities.notes: Work visas (AEWV), residence visas, employer accreditation

authorities.name: New Zealand Parliamentary Counsel Office
authorities.notes: Authoritative source for all NZ Acts, regulations, and legislative instruments

authorities.name: Accident Compensation Corporation (ACC)
authorities.notes: No-fault accident compensation; levies paid by employers and workers

authorities.name: Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE)
authorities.notes: Labor Code, OSH (RA 11058), AEP, DOLE registration, minimum wage oversight

authorities.name: Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR)
authorities.notes: Income tax, withholding tax, VAT (12%), BIR registration

authorities.name: Social Security System (SSS)
authorities.notes: Mandatory social insurance for private sector; sickness, maternity, disability, retirement

authorities.name: Philippine Health Insurance Corporation (PhilHealth)
authorities.notes: Mandatory health insurance; 5% of monthly salary, shared equally

authorities.name: Bureau of Immigration (BI)
authorities.notes: Employment visas (9g), ACR I-Card; high URL instability — verify quarterly

authorities.name: Official Gazette of the Philippines
authorities.notes: Executive Orders, Presidential Decrees, Republic Acts, proclamations

authorities.name: DOLE – Bureau of Working Conditions (BWC)
authorities.notes: OSH standards, OSHS, RA 11058 implementing rules, WAIR accident reporting

authorities.name: Ministry of Overseas Pakistanis & Human Resource Development
authorities.notes: Federal authority for labour policy, human resource development, and overseas workers. Note: Labour is a provincial subject under 18th Amendment — provincial labour departments (Punjab, Sindh, KPK, Balochistan) are primary enforcers.

authorities.name: Punjab Labour & Human Resource Department
authorities.notes: Primary labour enforcer for Punjab (largest province). Covers Punjab Minimum Wages, industrial relations, factory inspections.

authorities.name: Federal Board of Revenue (FBR)
authorities.notes: Federal authority for income tax, sales tax, withholding tax, customs. Issues Statutory Regulatory Orders (SROs) and tax circulars.

authorities.name: Employees' Old-Age Benefits Institution (EOBI)
authorities.notes: Mandatory pension/old-age benefit for private sector employees. Employer contributes 5%, employee 1% of minimum wage.

authorities.name: Provincial Employees Social Security Institution (PESSI / SESSI / KPESSI)
authorities.notes: Provincial social security (medical/sickness) — separate bodies per province: PESSI (Punjab), SESSI (Sindh), KPESSI (KPK). Balochistan equivalent has limited online presence.

authorities.name: Directorate General of Immigration & Passports
authorities.notes: Issues work visas, business visas, and manages foreigners registration. Work permits for foreign nationals also require BOI approval for certain categories.

authorities.name: Board of Investment (BOI) Pakistan
authorities.notes: Issues No Objection Certificates (NOCs) for foreign workers; oversees work permit approvals for expatriates in corporate roles.

authorities.name: National Assembly of Pakistan – Legislation
authorities.notes: Primary source for passed Acts. Punjab Assembly (punjabassembly.gov.pk) and Sindh Assembly (sindhassembly.gov.pk) for provincial legislation.

authorities.name: Pakistan Gazette – Ministry of Law and Justice
authorities.notes: Official gazette notifications for federal laws and SROs. Note: Digital archive is inconsistent; many older gazettes only available in print or via National Library.

authorities.name: Provincial Factory Inspectorates (under Labour Departments)
authorities.notes: OSH is governed by the Factories Act 1934 and provincial rules. No dedicated federal OSH agency exists — enforcement is via provincial Factory Inspectorates under each Labour Department. Dedicated OSH portal: not available at federal level.

source_endpoints.name: South Africa – Basic Conditions of Employment Act
South Africa – Occupational Health and Safety Act 85 of 1993
UAE – Federal Labour Law No. 33 of 2021
New Zealand – Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV)
New Zealand – Health and Safety at Work Act 2015
Pakistan – Ministry of Overseas Pakistanis & HRD
Pakistan – Punjab Labour & Human Resource Department
Pakistan – DGIP Work Visa & Foreigners Registration
Pakistan – BOI Work Permit / NOC for Expatriates
Pakistan – Ministry of Law & Justice (Gazette / Legislation)
Pakistan – Factories Act 1934 (OSH Framework)
source_endpoints.notes: No dedicated federal OSH portal exists. Factories Act 1934 is primary OSH statute; provincial rules vary. Dedicated OSH digital portal: NOT AVAILABLE at federal level.

parser_registry.description: General-purpose HTML readability extractor; strips nav/footer/ads and returns main content as markdown
OCR-based PDF extractor for scanned government gazettes and act PDFs
Playwright-based extractor for JavaScript-heavy SPAs and portals requiring dynamic rendering
CSS-selector targeted extractor for stable, well-structured HTML pages with predictable DOM layout
